name: inv_no_base_vaddr_alignment
code:
proof fn phi_1_inv_no_base_vaddr_alignment(d: Directory)
    requires
        d.inv(),
        d.arch.inv(),
        d.layer < d.arch.layers.len(),
    ensures
        // base_vaddr need not be aligned to entry_size * num_entries
        exists|d2: Directory|
            d2.inv() && d2.base_vaddr % (d2.entry_size() * d2.num_entries()) != 0,
{
}
reason: `well_formed` has the alignment constraint on `base_vaddr` commented out — directories can have unaligned base addresses

name: page_frame_base_unconstrained
reason: `inv()` constrains page frame *size* but not frame *base* — frame base is completely unconstrained, no alignment or identity mapping requirement

name: interp_aux_right_overrides_left
reason: `interp_aux` builds the map with earlier entries overriding later ones via `union_prefer_right` — key collisions silently shadow entries without the spec proving disjointness

name: subdirectory_base_not_aligned
reason: Subdirectory `base_vaddr` is computed from parent's `base_vaddr` which has no alignment constraint — misalignment propagates through the tree

name: empty_dir_nonempty_allowed
reason: `inv()` has `directories_are_nonempty` commented out — empty subdirectories are allowed, wasting page table entries without the spec preventing it
